title: Scout (disambiguation)
content:
'''Scout''' has more than one meaning: may refer to: 

{{IncompleteList}}

=='''[[Canon]]'''==
*'''[[Scout]]''', individuals who surveyed, patrolled, or explored areas of land or space.
*'''[[Scout (Canto Pass)|Scout]]''', a [[Canto Pass]] game piece.
*'''[[Scout II]]''', a Canto Pass game piece.
*'''[[Scout III]]''', a Canto Pass game piece.
*'''[[Scout IV]]''', a Canto Pass game piece.
*'''[[Scout guard]]''', [[militia]] [[soldier]]s marshalled by [[Magistrate]] [[Morgan Elsbeth]]
*'''[[Scout ship]]''', any starship employed in exploration or reconnoitering
*'''[[Scout trooper]]''', specialized [[stormtrooper]] variant used by the [[Galactic Empire]]
**'''[[Scout trooper armor]]''', [[armor]] worn by scout troopers
**'''[[Scout trooper corps]]''', a specialized [[corps]] of the [[Imperial Army]]'s [[Stormtrooper Corps]], consisting of scout troopers
**'''[[EC-17 hold-out blaster]]''' aka '''scout trooper blaster''', a model of [[Blaster pistol]]
**'''[[Unidentified scout trooper squad]]''', a squad of scout troopers stationed on [[Nevarro]]

*'''[[41st Scout Battalion]]''', a battalion within the [[41st Elite Corps]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic]]
*'''[[All Terrain Scout Transport]]''', a lightweight, bipedal [[walker]]
**'''[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Assault]]''', an assault variant All Terrain Scout Transport
**'''[[First Order All Terrain Scout Transport]]''', a model of All Terrain Scout Transport walker
**'''[[Tempest Scout 1]]''', the callsign of an All Terrain Scout Transport
**'''[[Tempest Scout 2]]''', the callsign of an All Terrain Scout Transport
**'''[[Tempest Scout 3]]''', the callsign of an All Terrain Scout Transport
**'''[[Tempest Scout 4]]''', the callsign of an All Terrain Scout Transport
**'''[[Tempest Scout 5]]''', the callsign of an All Terrain Scout Transport
**'''[[Tempest Scout 6]]''', the callsign of an All Terrain Scout Transport
*'''[[All Terrain Heavy Scout]]''', a model of walker used by the [[First Order]]
*'''[[Clone scout trooper]]''', specialized [[clone trooper]] variant
*'''[[TIE scout]]''', a type of [[TIE series]] starship
*'''[[Unidentified Advanced Recon Force Scout Trooper officer]]''', an Advanced Recon Force Scout Trooper in the Grand Army of the Republic
*'''[[Unidentified New Mandalorian scout]]''', a member of the [[Mandalorian Guard]]
*'''[[Y-wing scout bomber]]''', a prototype starfighter similar to the BTL-A4 Y-wing assault starfighter/bomber 

=='''[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]'''==
*'''[[Scout/Legends|Scout]]''', individuals who surveyed, patrolled, or explored areas of land or space.
*'''"Scout"''' aka '''[[Tallisibeth Enwandung-Esterhazy]]''', a [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]-era [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], was best known by the nickname "Scout".
*'''[[Scout platoon]]''', a formation used by the Imperial Army
*'''[[Scout ship]]''', a starship used either for commercial and scientific exploration, or for military intelligence gathering and reconnaissance. 
*'''[[Scout ship (TIE model)]]''', a [[TIE series/Legends|TIE series]] variant 
*'''[[Scout trooper/Legends|Scout trooper]]''', specialized [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] variant used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]
**'''[[Scout trooper armor/Legends|Scout trooper armor]], [[Armor/Legends|armor]] worn by scout troopers
**'''[[Scout trooper blaster pistol/Legends|Scout trooper blaster pistol]]''', a type of [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]]
*'''[[87-RM Scout Collector]]''', a type of [[droid]]
*'''[[A-24 Sleuth-class scout ship]]''', model of high-performance scout ship
*'''[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport]]''', a bipedal [[Walker/Legends|walker]]
**'''[[All Terrain Scout Transport/Assault/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transport/Assault]]''', a variant of the AT-ST walker
**'''[[Tempest Scout 2/Legends|Tempest Scout 2]]''', the callsign of an All Terrain Scout Transport
*'''[[Armored Scout Tank]]''', a repulsorcraft vehicle used by the Trade Federation
*'''[[AV-1S Scout Armor]]''',  a model of military scout armor. 
*'''[[Clone scout trooper/Legends|Clone scout trooper]]''', specialized [[Clone trooper/Legends|trooper]] variant
**'''[[Clone scout trooper armor]]''', lightweight [[Clone trooper armor/Legends|clone trooper armor]] used by Clone scout troopers
**'''[[Unidentified clone scout battalion]]''', battalion of clone scout troopers
**'''[[Unidentified clone scout trooper]]''', a member of the 41st Elite Corps
*'''[[E-9 Explorer-class armed long range scout vessel]]''', a scout vessel produced by the [[Loronar Corporation/Legends|Loronar Corporation]]
*'''[[Lone Scout-A]]''', a type of scout ship
*'''[[Lone Scout A-2]]''', a variant of scout ship
*'''[[Jedi Scout Fighter]]''', a type of starship
*'''[[Mountain Terrain Scout Transport]]''', a six-legged ground walker 
*'''[[Pathfinder-class scout ship]]''', a scout vessel first produced by [[Vangaard Industries]]
*'''[[RC-2 Twilight scoutship]]''', a type of scout ship
*'''[[Rebel Scout Speeder]]''', a combat [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] used by the Rebel Alliance
*'''[[Republic scout speeder]]''', a heavily armed repulsorcraft
*'''[[SCT Scout craft]]''', long range reconnaissance vessels
*'''[[SRV-1 Scout and Retrieval Vehicle ]]''', a treaded vehicle
*'''[[Unidentified New Mandalorian scout/Legends|Unidentified New Mandalorian scout]]''', a member of the [[Mandalorian Guard/Legends|Mandalorian Guard]]
*'''[[Vaya-class scout]]''', a type of scout ship manufactured by [[Hoersch-Kessel Drive, Inc./Legends]]
*'''[[Wanderer Scout Surveyor]]''', a model of [[Survey droid/Legends|survey droid]] manufactured by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]
*'''[[Y-wing scout bomber/Legends|Y-wing scout bomber]]''', a variant of the BTL-B Y-wing starfighter 
*'''[[Yuuzhan Vong advance scout ship]]''', a type of scout ship used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]
*'''[[Z-10 Seeker-class scout ship]]''', a model of scout ship manufactured by [[Starfeld Industries/Legends|Starfeld industries]]

{{Disambig}}
